## Improvements

- **Voice typing settings now show when auto-paste is missing its Accessibility permission.** If the grant is missing — or went stale after the app was updated or moved — Settings → Voice typing displays a clear inline notice with a one-click "Grant Accessibility" button that takes you straight to the right System Settings pane. Previously the degraded state (dictation copying to the clipboard but not pasting) was invisible unless you were using the fn-key trigger.
